case_title: HECTOR R OSSORIO VS. VALENCIA STREET GYM.LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSSORIO, HECTOR R AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA STREET GYM.LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA VALENCIA STREET MUSCLE & FITNESS

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSSORIO, HECTOR R AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA STREET GYM.LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA VALENCIA STREET MUSCLE & FITNESS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF OSSORIO, HECTOR R

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSSORIO, HECTOR R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENCIA STREET GYM.LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA VALENCIA STREET MUSCLE & FITNESS $2,323.82 PRINCIPAL, $4.02 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,507.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
